name: Brandy Eggnog
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine egg yolks, 1/2 cup super fine sugar, nutmeg, salt, and vanilla extract. Beat with a rotary beater or electric mixer until very thick and light yellow in color.
2. Gradually add the brandy and milk to the egg mixture. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 8 hours, preferably overnight.
3. About 30 minutes before serving, beat egg whites with a pinch of salt until soft peaks form.
4. Gradually add an additional 1/2 cup super fine sugar to the beaten egg whites using the same beater, beating until just stiff peaks form.
5. Beat whipping cream until soft peaks form.
6. Gently fold the meringue into the whipped cream.
7. Slowly pour the chilled brandy mixture into the meringue and cream mixture, folding gently with a spatula to combine.
8. Serve chilled.
